raw_title: Book Review: ‘Project Maven,’ by Katrina Manson
description: In “Project Maven,” Katrina Manson shows us how close we are to artificial intelligence picking targets and dropping bombs without human input.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Hothouse’ and ‘Death in Rome,’ by Wolfgang Koeppen
book_title: ‘The Hothouse’ and ‘Death in Rome,’ by Wolfgang Koeppen
description: The German writer Wolfgang Koeppen’s postwar trilogy crackles with life and unsparing details of a broken society.
